name: Lobster or Shrimp Fra Diavolo
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Shrimp or lobster (raw, shelled and cleaned)
28 ounce Can Crushed tomatoes (or more to taste)
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt butter in olive oil over medium heat. Saute onion until golden.
2. Add garlic and saute for another minute.
3. Add tomatoes and cook until softened.
4. Stir in red pepper flakes, dried thyme, basil, parsley, bay leaf, oregano, and hot pepper.
5. Add shrimp or lobster to the sauce and simmer for 15 minutes.
6. Remove bay leaf and hot pepper halves.
7. Add remaining ingredients (salt, pepper) and simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
8. Serve pasta with sauce, topped with extra sauce and fish. Garnish with grated cheese.
Serve with plenty of bread and wine. A fresh salad and cold fruit after dinner are also recommended.
